text: & @~/Downloads/; o = ) seccomp-tools Usage: seccomp-tools [--version] [--help] <command> [<options>] [RES o) a el EL T ER EHL Seccomp bpf assembler. disasm Disassemble seccomp bpf. dump Automatically dump seccomp bpf from execution file(s). emu Emulate seccomp rules. See 'seccomp-tools <command> --help' to read about a specific subcommand.
